mapper.select: SELECT id, type_id, item_name, deduct_mode, fixed_score, base_score, per_person_score, range_config, description, sort_order, status, allow_photo, allow_remark, allow_students, created_at, updated_at FROM deduction_items WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, type_id, item_name, deduct_mode, fixed_score, base_score, per_person_score, range_config, description, sort_order, status, allow_photo, allow_remark, allow_students, created_at, updated_at FROM deduction_items WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
